blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
